name: Ok Corral Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the carrots and slice them into thin matchsticks.
2. The pasta salad is named after the shape of the pasta, but you could use shells and call it Seashell Salad.
3. Toss all ingredients in a large salad bowl and chill. Make ahead: Chill before serving.
4. BASIC DRESSING
- 1 cup Extra-virgin olive oil
- 2 tablespoons Honey
- 2/3 cup Brown rice vinegar
- Freshly ground black pepper (or 1 teaspoon)
- 1 garlic clove, mashed
Combine all ingredients and shake or blend well. Refrigerate. Keeps up to a week. Makes about 2 cups.
